name: Special k Cereal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the margarine, sugar, and Karo syrup in a saucepan.
2. Heat over medium until the mixture is well combined (about 1 1/2 to 2 minutes).
3. Remove from heat and stir in the peanut butter and Special K cereal.
4. Drop spoonfuls of the dough onto wax paper.
5. Allow to cool completely before breaking or storing.
